              Gentilini Wine Tasting
              Robola · Muscat · Minies, Kefalonia
              About Gentilini Winery

              To Gentilini Winery is one of the most celebrated wineries in Kefalonia, known for award-winning whites from the indigenous Robola grape. Founded in 1984 by Nick Cosmetatos, operating organically since 2005. Located in Minies, just 15 minutes from White Rocks.

              ⭐ 4.7/5 Google Organic since 2005 Award-winning Est. 1984
              Location & Hours
              Minies, Kefalonia (near Argostoli)
              Mon–Sat 10:00–18:00
              ~15 min from White Rocks
              +30 2671 069615
              www.gentilini.gr
              Main Wines
              Robola Classic
              White · Dry · Citrus, honey, minerals
              Gentilini Fume
              White · Dry · Robola oak-aged
              Eclectique Rose
              Rose · Dry · Mavrodaphne + Syrah
              Muscat
              White · Off-dry · Moschofilerο
              Tasting Experience
              3-wine tasting + vineyard tour
              ~EUR 12–15/person
              ~45–60 minutes
              Reservation recommended
              Tip: Ideal with Van Tour 2 or afternoon standalone
              Staff Tips for Guests
              Best time to visit
              Morning 10:00–13:00 for fewer crowds and cooler weather
              Combine with
              Agios Gerasimos Monastery (5 min) + Drogarati + Melissani
              Shop prices
              Robola Classic EUR 12–15 · Fume EUR 18–22
              GPS Directions
              "Gentilini Winery Kefalonia" · Lassi to Argostoli to Minies
              🎾
              Tennis Club Argostoli Lassi
              Tennis Lessons · Court Rental · Lassi, Kefalonia
              About Tennis Club Argostoli Lassi

              The Tennis Club Argostoli Lassi offers guests the chance to book their own court or take a lesson, right in the Lassi area. Highly rated by visitors on Google. Rackets and balls are included with court rental — no need to bring your own gear.

              ⭐ 4.8/5 Google Rackets & Balls Included Lessons Available Open Daily 07:00–23:00
              Location & Hours
              Argostoli – Lassi area, Kefalonia
              Daily 07:00–23:00
              Close to White Rocks Hotel
              +30 693 815 1944
              What's Offered
              Tennis Lessons
              Coaching available · call to book
              Court Rental
              EUR 20 · rackets & balls included
              Booking Info
              EUR 20 per court session
              Rackets & balls included
              Call ahead to reserve a spot
              Tip: Reservation recommended, especially evenings
              Staff Tips for Guests
              Call to reserve
              +30 693 815 1944 · courts can fill up in the evening
              Equipment
              Rackets & balls included — guests don't need to bring anything
              Best time to visit
              Early morning or evening to avoid midday heat
              Good for
              Both lessons (with coach) and casual court rental
              Marked as done
              Do you need a follow up tomorrow?
